description: Single-file PHP project with two planted defects, hermetic run. First e2e for the PHP image (DHI php language base: PHP pre-baked, plus the layered node toolchain + in-place global eslint pin for JS/TS support, plus the composer toolchain). Proves qodana-php builds (base + node + eslint + composer + dist + cli + runtime), loads its Ultimate PhpStorm profile, and scans a real .php producing SARIF. Driver name + rule ids are NEEDS-PINNING starting guesses — pin from a CI control run and confirm both are enabled in THIS image's default PS (PhpStorm) profile.

expectations.reason: STARTING-GUESS id: the planted `$unused = $value * 2;` local that is assigned and never read must surface as an unused-local-variable inspection; pin the exact id from a CI control run and confirm it is in the Ultimate PhpStorm profile.

STARTING-GUESS id: the planted non-strict comparison `if ($name == 0)` (string vs int literal) must surface as a type-unsafe-comparison inspection; pin the exact id from a CI control run and confirm it is in the Ultimate PhpStorm profile.
